jobDescription: We With Alan , we are re-inventing the way we live our health. We started by building health insurance. We are the first new insurance since 1986 and we raised € 12 million in seed! We have a very good growth, and an amazing team that we would like to grow even further to bring the best service to our users. Outsourced telephone customer service, no thanks! With us, the customer service is sacred, everyone participates. We are the voice of our customers internally and we represent Alan to the outside world. Our team is full of empathy, always ready to help a lost customer. Our motivation? Make them love their "mutual" for the first time to our users and go beyond their expectations. You You dream of building the best customer service for health insurance and you want to become a User Care Expert. You like to serve your loved ones, and you like to do it well. By the way, your grandmother often asks you for help on your computer. Your empathy makes you the user's ambassador in the evolution of our product. You want to understand the behavior of our users, to be vigilant and to be proactive in adopting innovative tools for customer service. You are ready to spend the time you need on a member's question, to put a bug back to the developers to find the bottom of the problem, to finally help them and explain the solution very simply. In addition to helping our members, you believe in Alan, and you want to talk about Alan to everyone, especially the curious who write to us and hesitate to take the plunge. Do you recognize yourself? So, we have a place for you.skills You like to write and write answers for a variety of audiences. You have trouble falling asleep until you reach inbox zero in your email client. You have an empathy above the average. You stay calm when everyone gets angry. You are comfortable with technology. Fog, you are used to looking for information by yourself. You speak English Cherries on the cake You like to understand the functioning of the French health system. Besides the acronyms BRSS, CAS or OPTAM do not scare you (otherwise we will help you). You have already worked with clients (companies or individuals) and you have appreciated their service. You have commercial fiber.
